title: tragacantha incurva
intro: Tragacantha incurva, also known as the curled or hooked milk thistle, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has been traditionally used to treat liver and gallbladder disorders. The health benefits of Tragacantha incurva include its ability to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and improve overall liver function. Tragacantha incurva can be prepared as a herbal supplement, often in capsule or tablet form, or as a tincture or tea, although its preparations and uses should be consulted with a medical professional before consumption.
